---
title: "Paolo Aldair Machaca Beltran"
subtitle: "<center>Economist</center>"
image: /files/img/paolo.jpg
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round  
  links:
    - icon: Gmail
      text: Gmail
      href: "mailto:paolomachacab@gmail.com"
    - icon: Bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: "https://bsky.app/profile/paolomachacab.bsky.social"
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/paolomachacab
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/paolomachaca
---

::: {#hero-heading}
:::

<div style="text-align: justify">

Welcome! I am an **economist** with experience in macroeconomic research and policy analysis. I hold a degree in Economics from the *Universidad Mayor de San Andrés*, and I specialize in **development economics**, **labor markets**, and **impact evaluations**. 

Currently, I am conducting research on the *wage penalties for motherhood in Bolivia* as part of the *Ecomienza 2024* program, applying econometric methods like the Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition to analyze labor market disparities. I have also been trained in evaluation methodologies through *J-PAL LAC* and *IPA Peru*, enhancing my skills in impact evaluation, Python programming, and data management.


</div>
